mapper.select: SELECT id, session_id, question_id, answer_text, selected_choice, is_correct, graded_at FROM answer_sheet WHERE session_id = #{sessionId} ORDER BY question_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO answer_sheet (session_id, question_id, answer_text, selected_choice) VALUES (#{sessionId}, #{questionId}, #{answerText}, #{selectedChoice})
mapper.update: UPDATE answer_sheet SET is_correct = #{isCorrect}, graded_at = NOW() WHERE id = #{id}
